---
title: "AD698 - Applied Generative AI"
subtitle: "SEC 10-K Financial RAG: Student Build Plan"
number-sections: true
date: "2026-04-28"
date-modified: today
date-format: long
categories: ['Deep Learning Foundations', 'PyTorch', 'Neural Networks', 'Tensors', 'Workflow Design', 'Deliverable Design']
description: "Guides students through project work on SEC 10-K Financial RAG: Student Build Plan, emphasizing reproducible artifacts, validation evidence, interpretation, and business-facing communication."
---

# What You Are Building

In this course project, you will build a domain-scoped financial RAG system over SEC 10-K filings.

Primary platform:
- Google Colab
- Google Drive storage

Optional platform:
- Local machine
- GitHub (optional only)

:::{.callout-important}
GitHub is not required. You will be graded on pipeline quality, grounding quality, and evaluation quality.
:::

# Four-Step Project Roadmap

1. Industry selection, SEC metadata parsing, 10-K download, item extraction.
2. Item selection, cleaning, and exploratory analysis.
3. Chunking, embeddings, and vector index construction.
4. RAG generation and evaluation.

# Required Student Outputs

- data/outputs/filing_metadata.csv
- data/outputs/industry_filing_panel.csv
- data/outputs/cleaned_item_metadata.csv
- data/chunked/sec10k_chunks.parquet
- data/vector_store/
- data/outputs/rag_answers.csv
- data/outputs/rag_evaluation.csv
- optional: data/outputs/company_price_features.csv

# Submission Rule

Each team should submit:
- one short technical report
- one reproducible notebook bundle
- one outputs folder with required CSV/parquet artifacts
